title: dupatya ithyphylla
intro: Dupatya ithyphylla, also known as Indian dill, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve flatulence, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Dupatya ithyphylla include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and can also be used in cooking to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
